name: Besa
metaTitle: Property in Besa Nagpur | NMRDA Approved Plots | Mahalaxmi Infra
metaDescription: Buy NMRDA sanctioned, RERA approved plots in Besa Nagpur. Starting ₹22 Lakh. Up to 90% bank finance. Contact Mahalaxmi Infra today.
introduction: Besa is one of Nagpur's most sought-after residential localities for budget buyers and first-time investors. Located off Wardha Road, Besa strikes the perfect balance between affordability and urban connectivity. The area is well-served by schools, hospitals, local markets, and daily convenience stores, making it an ideal destination for families looking to settle down. Over the last five years, NMRDA-approved layouts in Besa have recorded consistent annual appreciation of 12–20%, driven primarily by the area's proximity to the MIHAN corridor and Wardha Road. Mahalaxmi Infra has successfully completed multiple residential layout projects in the Besa-Beltarodi zone, and each has delivered strong returns to early investors. If you are looking for a plot that combines affordability with future value, Besa remains one of the top choices in Nagpur in 2025.
whyInvest: Affordable entry price near Wardha Road
Schools, hospitals, and markets already in place
Proximity to MIHAN without premium pricing

faqs.question: Is Besa a good area to buy property in Nagpur?
faqs.answer: Yes. Besa is one of Nagpur's most popular areas for affordable residential plots. It offers good connectivity, established social infrastructure, and consistent appreciation.

faqs.question: What is the price of plots in Besa Nagpur?
faqs.answer: Mahalaxmi Infra projects near Besa start from ₹22 Lakh. Contact us for current availability.

faqs.question: Is bank loan available for plots in Besa?
faqs.answer: Yes. NMRDA approved plots in Besa are eligible for up to 90% bank finance from SBI, Bank of Maharashtra, and Axis Bank.
